infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Careo needs camera access to take photos for journal entries and documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Careo needs photo library access to attach images to journal entries and documents.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Careo uses your location to find nearby pharmacies and emergency services.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Careo sends reminders for medications, appointments, and wellness check-ins.
